instructions.instruction: **Always authenticate in `connect/3`** — tokens must be verified; channels bypass the Plug pipeline
instructions.original_snippets: **Always authenticate in `connect/3`** — tokens must be verified; channels bypass the Plug pipeline
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger phoenix-channels-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Use `handle_in` for client-to-server, `push` for server-to-client, `broadcast` for server-to-all**
instructions.original_snippets: **Use `handle_in` for client-to-server, `push` for server-to-client, `broadcast` for server-to-all**
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger phoenix-channels-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Use Presence for tracking connected users** — don't roll your own presence tracking
instructions.original_snippets: **Use Presence for tracking connected users** — don't roll your own presence tracking
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger phoenix-channels-essentials.

instructions.instruction: Generate a token server-side after user authentication → see [Step 2](#step-2--generate-tokens-server-side)
instructions.original_snippets: Generate a token server-side after user authentication → see [Step 2](#step-2--generate-tokens-server-side)
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger phoenix-channels-essentials.

instructions.instruction: Verify the token in `connect/3`; if auth fails, confirm salt matches between `sign` and `verify` and `max_age` hasn't expired → see [Step 3](#step-3--verify-tokens-in-the-socket)
instructions.original_snippets: Verify the token in `connect/3`; if auth fails, confirm salt matches between `sign` and `verify` and `max_age` hasn't expired → see [Step 3](#step-3--verify-tokens-in-the-socket)
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger phoenix-channels-essentials.

instructions.instruction: Use token-based authentication — session-based auth is unavailable in channels.
instructions.original_snippets: Use token-based authentication — session-based auth is unavailable in channels.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger phoenix-channels-essentials.

instructions.instruction: Define a Presence module once per app, then track users in `handle_info(:after_join, ...)`:
instructions.original_snippets: Define a Presence module once per app, then track users in `handle_info(:after_join, ...)`:
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger phoenix-channels-essentials.

instructions.instruction: Use `Phoenix.ChannelTest` to test socket connections, joins, and message handling:
instructions.original_snippets: Use `Phoenix.ChannelTest` to test socket connections, joins, and message handling:
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger phoenix-channels-essentials.
